title: iris iberica subsp. lycotis
intro: Iris iberica subsp. lycotis, also known as the Caucasian iris, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family and is native to the Caucasus region. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The medicinal properties of Iris iberica subsp. lycotis include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, which can lead to health benefits such as reduced pain and improved skin health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
